summary: Search professional profiles by filters with advanced inclusion and exclusion criteria.

query_params.name: search
query_params.description: Search query supporting fuzzy matching and search operators

query_params.name: currentCompanies
query_params.description: Filter by current company IDs or URLs (comma-separated, max 50)

query_params.name: pastCompanies
query_params.description: Filter by past company IDs or URLs (comma-separated, max 50)

query_params.name: geoIds
query_params.description: Filter by Geo ID, overrides location parameter (comma-separated)

query_params.name: schools
query_params.description: Filter by school IDs or URLs (comma-separated, max 50)

query_params.name: currentJobTitles
query_params.description: Filter by current job titles (comma-separated, max 70)

query_params.name: pastJobTitles
query_params.description: Filter by past job titles (comma-separated, max 70)

query_params.name: yearsAtCurrentCompanyIds
query_params.description: Filter by years at current company (comma-separated)

query_params.name: yearsOfExperienceIds
query_params.description: Filter by total years of experience (comma-separated)

query_params.name: recentlyChangedJobs
query_params.description: Filter profiles with job changes in last 90 days

query_params.name: postedOnLinkedin
query_params.description: Filter profiles with activity in last 30 days

query_params.name: companyHeadquarterLocations
query_params.description: Filter by company HQ location (comma-separated, max 70)

query_params.name: salesNavUrl
query_params.description: Parse and use search URL; overrides other parameters except page

query_params.name: page
query_params.description: Page number for pagination (clamped at 100, default 1)

query_params.name: sessionId
query_params.description: Session ID to route requests through same resource

query_params.name: usePrivatePool
query_params.description: Use private resource pool if available

query_params.name: requiredAccountId
query_params.description: Specify which account to use from private pool

notes: page parameter clamped at max 100. sessionId routes requests through same resource (slower). salesNavUrl overrides all other params except page and sessionId. Most filters accept comma-separated values with specified maximums.
